text:
2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 01 = Beneficiary 
02 = Beneficiary's prescriber 
03 = Caregiver 
99 = Other authorized individual 
Null/missing = beneficiary did not receive a CMR 

COMMENT: If the beneficiary received a CMR offer, then the recipient of the CMR offer is required. If the 
beneficiary received more than 1 CMR offer, report the recipient of the initial CMR offer. 

This field is available in the 2019–2021 data files.
